name: Tower of Babel
overview: A prosecutor who started his career as a newspaper reporter faces a life-changing event when his father dies in an unexplained accident, and his mother takes her own life. With his life shattered in pieces, he will stop at nothing to discover what happened and get revenge.

trailers.title: TOWER OF BABEL - OFFICIAL TRAILER | Park Shi Hoo, Jang Hee Jin, Kim Ji Hoon, Jang Shin Young
